blocker: Real gradient training requires a GPU/training backend not available in this frozen-LLM env; comparison numbers are a transparently-labeled competence-vs-difficulty simulation, not measured model reward. One-function seam (simulate_run) swaps in real rex.scoring.score_plan eval.
one_line: Reused A12 difficulty order to build a banded GRPO curriculum training_config.json (51 incidents/5 stages/616 samples) + a curriculum-vs-random-vs-anti comparison harness; 10/10 tests pass, sim shows curriculum AUC 0.168 > random 0.093 > anti.
